title.en: Most Difficult Case 最困难的状态

content.en:
Most Difficult Case 最困难的状态

D2 F2 B D2 B U2 R2 U B2 L U2 R B' L2 D' R B' U B' L, where that and that + F' both take 20

Here's a position that will answer some of the questions:

https://alpha.twizzle.net/explore/?alg=F%27+R%27+F2+U2+F+L2+B+D2+R2+L2+U+B2+U+B%27+D2+F+L2+D2+R%27+F%27&fbclid=IwAR2c-DGGlcI1E0OlasmbwXua_Ihxq3r4d0FpzoqSR9IE2gesyeiiQNnoEKQ

F' R' F2 U2 F L2 B D2 R2 L2 U B2 U B' D2 F L2 D2 R' F'

Every piece is in its proper position, but 10 of the 12 edges are solved (two are flipped). All corners are rotated. That (and its rotations and inverse) is the only distance 20 position I know of that has more pieces solved than superflip. I know of no position at distance 20 with all edges solved (and I am pretty sure it has been proven that there is none, but I can't find a reference at the moment.)

EO (Inv)222

FM (X)cross

7 move EO, 8 move 222, 8 move cross, 10 move Xcross, 20 FM, This is unique in all 3x3 case.

描述最难打乱状态: 使用某些还原方法的第一阶段的最少步数恰好为该阶段的上帝之数, 以及整颗魔方的最少步为魔方的上帝之数.

合理定义最难打乱状态: 全色底下, 最多步EO (7步), 最多步222砖 (8步), 最多步逆打乱222砖 (8步), 最多步十字 (8步), 最多步拓展十字 (8步), 最多步还原 (20步). 不加说明, 步数均默认为HTM下的步数.

陈霜给出了相关的大量数据和很多完整的状态 (会在以后的相关推送里陆续给出), 颜瑞民从中找到了满足条件的状态并且确认此类状态唯一:

d (20*).

该打乱的STM解法: z' S' M U B2 R L F U2 M U2 B U' S2 M2 U R' (16s*)

事实上, 最难打乱状态的定义是从这些数据分析出来的. 条件约束太多, 则不存在满足的状态; 太少, 则状态又太多; 条件之间也不能发生冲突. 在不冲突的前提下, 尽可能地加入约束条件, 以此定义最难打乱.

对称类型: D_2d (edge)

对称类型: D_2d (棱)

该情况中, 白底 = 黄底 = 镜像绿底 = 镜像蓝底; 红底 = 橙底. CFOP玩家只需关注白底和红底.

最困难阶段

EO (7*)

F U R D B L' F

cross (8*)

U: z2 F R L D2 F B L D'

L: z' F R B L' B2 R2 F D'

R: z F R B L' B2 R2 F D'

F: x' F R L D2 F B L D'

B: x F R L D2 F B L D'

U: z2 F2 R2 D2 R' F U B' R' L D'

L: z' F2 R L U B' R2 F' R' D' B'

R: z F R' B U F2 L2 B L D' L2

F: x' F2 R2 D2 R' F U B' R' L D'

B: x F2 R2 D2 R' F U B' R' L D'

L: z' R2 F2 R' U L2 B' D R D2 B' F

F: x' F' R' B' L2 U B' L2 F' L' D' R

B: x F' R' B' L2 U B' L2 F' L' D' R

xxxcross

xxxxcross

UFL: U R' F2 D2 B' D L F

ULB: U F' U2 B2 D' L' D' B'

UBR: U R D2 B' R2 U B2 R

DLF: R D' F' L D2 U L2 F'

DBL: R U' B' D F L' B' D'

DRB: U L D' B R' D' U B'

Inverse 222 (8*)

UFL: U R' U2 B D' U2 L F
